name: infolingo

metadata.name: infolingo
metadata.summary: Efficient Vocabulary Selection for Foreign-Language Learning.

documentation:
# Infolingo – Efficient Vocabulary Selection for Foreign-Language Learning

Infolingo uses cross-entropy and probability to optimize the next best words to learn to improve understanding of a foreign language text.

## Installation

Use the package manager [pip](https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/) to install infolingo.

```bash
pip install infolingo
```

## Usage

```python
from infolingo import pick_vocab

# returns ["jumps", "fox"]
pick_vocab("The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog", n=2)
```

## Roadmap

- [ ] Multi-language Support
    - [ ] Spanish
    - [ ] French

functions.name: infolingo.main.get_word_stats
documentation:
Get word count and word probability mass function (PMF) from list.
\:param words: list of words.
\:return: word counts and word PMF.

functions.name: infolingo.main.tokenize_text
documentation:
Tokenize text into words specific to a language, i.e. no
numbers or special characters.
\:param text: input text.
\:return: list of words.

functions.name: infolingo.main.pick_cross_entropy
documentation:
Select the top n words that reduce cross-entropy the most.
\:param words: list of candidate words.
\:param corpus_word_probs: corpus word probabilities.
\:param n: number of words to select.
\:return: list of top n words using cross-entropy.

functions.name: infolingo.main.pick_vocab
documentation:
Select best vocabulary to learn from text.
\:param text: input text.
\:param n: number of words to select.
\:return: list of top n words to learn using cross-entropy.
